${modID}:PowerID.NAME: Ultimate Power
DESCRIPTIONS: You are Very Cool and Strong.

${modID}:CollateralDamagePower.NAME: Collateral Damage
DESCRIPTIONS: Whenever you lose HP during your turn, deal %d damage to a random enemy.

${modID}:RegenerationPower.NAME: Regeneration
DESCRIPTIONS: Rampage: Heal.

${modID}:DelayedRegenerationPower.NAME: Delayed Regeneration
DESCRIPTIONS: Heal %d HP at the start of your next %d turn(s).

${modID}:StrategicStrikesPower.NAME: Strategic Strikes
DESCRIPTIONS: Draw
card(s) whenever you play a card containing "Strike".

${modID}:FacingDestinyPower.NAME: Facing Destiny
DESCRIPTIONS: Immune to damage for %d more turn(s).

${modID}:FacingDestinyHealPower.NAME: Facing Destiny
DESCRIPTIONS: At the end of combat, heal %d HP.

${modID}:SurpassingPower.NAME: Surpassing
DESCRIPTIONS: Rampage: Gain 1 Strength this turn.

${modID}:SurpassingPowerUpg.NAME: Surpassing+
DESCRIPTIONS: Rampage: Gain 1 Strength and 1 Dexterity this turn.

${modID}:MorphingPower.NAME: No One Will Pass
DESCRIPTIONS: Rampage: Gain Block.

${modID}:pilgrimagePower.NAME: Pilgrimage
DESCRIPTIONS: Removes all your debuffs at the end of your turn. NL Lasts
turns.

${modID}:BootCampPower.NAME: Boot Camp
DESCRIPTIONS: All Soldier cards are upgraded, wherever they are.

${modID}:CursedRegenerationPower.NAME: Cursed Regeneration
DESCRIPTIONS: At the start of each turn, lose %d HP then heal %d HP.

${modID}:SacrificialPlatingPower.NAME: Sacrificial Plating
DESCRIPTIONS: At the start of your next turn, gain %d Block and heal %d HP.

${modID}:DelayedTempStrengthPower.NAME: Rising Fury
DESCRIPTIONS: At the start of your next turn, gain %d temporary Strength.

${modID}:KeenSensesPower.NAME: Keen Senses
DESCRIPTIONS: At the start of your turns: NL Bloodhunt (%d): draw %d card(s).

${modID}:SacramentGoldPower.NAME: Sacrament
DESCRIPTIONS: Gain %d gold whenever an enemy dies this combat.

${modID}:RallyTheTroopsPower.NAME: Rally the Troops
DESCRIPTIONS: Whenever you take damage during your turn, add %d random Soldier card(s) to your hand.

${modID}:DeathMarkPower.NAME: Death Mark
DESCRIPTIONS: When this enemy dies, you gain %d temporary Strength.

${modID}:CommandingPresencePower.NAME: Commanding Presence
DESCRIPTIONS: At the start of each of your turns, add %d random Soldier card(s) to your hand.

${modID}:LoseThornsPower.NAME: Lose Thorns
DESCRIPTIONS: Lose
Thorns at the start of your next turn.

${modID}:DelayedBlockPower.NAME: Delayed Guard
DESCRIPTIONS: At the start of your next turn, gain %d Block.

${modID}:DelayedSelfDamagePower.NAME: Reckless Guard
DESCRIPTIONS: Lose %d HP at the start of your next turn.

${modID}:DoubleImpactPower.NAME: Double Impact
DESCRIPTIONS: All Attacks you play this turn are played twice.
All Attacks and Skills you play this turn are played twice.
